name: Stone Giant

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Poison, Psychic; Charmed, Exhaustion, Frightened, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

text:
# Stone Giant

*Large Construct, Unaligned*

### Actions

**Slam.** Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) Force damage.

**Force Bolt.** Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 120 ft. Hit: 22 (4d10) Force damage.
